description_long: This is a tall, elegant ceramic vase with a classic hourglass silhouette, featuring a wide flared mouth and a rounded body that tapers at the neck. The surface is finished in a glossy white glaze, adorned with a striking cherry blossom motif in shades of pink and red, with black branches extending organically around the body. The floral design is distributed asymmetrically, creating a dynamic and artistic appearance from every angle. The vase's smooth, reflective surface enhances the vibrancy of the painted blossoms and gives it a refined, decorative quality. The interior appears hollow, suitable for holding flowers or other decorative items. Its overall aesthetic suggests a blend of traditional East Asian artistry and modern minimalism, making it a standout piece for urban decorative settings.
description: A glossy white ceramic vase with a flared mouth, decorated with vivid pink cherry blossom branches and a smooth, reflective finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vase's wide mouth and a prominent cherry blossom branch with clustered pink flowers curving across the body.
description_view_1: This side highlights a dense cluster of blossoms and branches, with the floral motif wrapping more fully around the lower body.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a sparser arrangement of branches and blossoms, with more visible white space and a subtle continuation of the floral pattern.
description_view_3: This angle displays a balanced mix of blossoms and branches, with the floral design appearing to climb upward toward the mouth.
